title: The City Holds Its Breath
description: On pages 18–21, this part focuses on the city holds its breath, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: The City Holds Its Breath. The bomb’s location and countdown push the Alubarna battle into its final desperate stage. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: ...now all that's left is to see if I truly can cut through iron or not!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: You think you can take my attack with a single sword?

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: I won't be taking any of your attacks anymore...

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Using Gallery Pirates, do the samba!

summary: This part develops the city holds its breath and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
